# restacked-mcp-test

> A test repository for the Restacked MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration.

This repository is used to test and demonstrate the Restacked MCP server, which enables AI assistants like Claude to interact with GitHub repositories — reading files, listing repos, and committing changes — directly through the MCP protocol.

## Features

- GitHub repository listing via MCP
- File reading and writing through MCP tools
- Demonstrates Restacked's MCP server capabilities

## Usage

This repo serves as a sandbox for testing MCP-powered GitHub operations via [Restacked](https://restacked.ai).

## Links

- [Restacked](https://restacked.ai)
- [MCP Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io)
